member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.AssignTags
member.summary: Assign initial tags to a target (Idea/Signal). Meant to be invoked from integration events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.AssignTags.#ctor(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Assign initial tags to a target (Idea/Signal). Meant to be invoked from integration events.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.AssignTagsHandler
member.summary: Handles the assignment of initial tags to a specified target.
Assigns the specified tags to the target, resolving or creating tag records as needed.
member.param: The command containing the target, actor, and labels to assign.
Resolves or creates tags by label within a locality.
The repository for taggable target aggregates.
The unit of work for persisting changes.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTarget
member.summary: Represents an operation in which a participant identifies a taggable target.
member.param: The unique identifier of the target to be identified.
The unique identifier of the participant performing the identification.
Optional initial tag labels to assign atomically with creation.
The timestamp to use for the initial tag assignment. Required when is non-empty.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTarget.#ctor(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Represents an operation in which a participant identifies a taggable target.
member.param: The unique identifier of the target to be identified.
The unique identifier of the participant performing the identification.
Optional initial tag labels to assign atomically with creation.
The timestamp to use for the initial tag assignment. Required when is non-empty.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTarget.TargetId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the target to be identified.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTarget.ActorId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the participant performing the identification.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTarget.InitialTags
member.summary: Optional initial tag labels to assign atomically with creation.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTarget.TagsOccurredAt
member.summary: The timestamp to use for the initial tag assignment. Required when is non-empty.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.CreateTaggableTargetHandler
member.summary: Handles the creation of a new taggable target if one does not already exist.
Creates a new taggable target if one with the specified identifier does not already exist, optionally assigning initial tags in the same transaction.
member.param: The command containing the target identifier to create.
The repository for taggable target aggregates.
Resolves or creates tags by label.
The unit of work for persisting changes.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.RemoveTags
member.summary: Remove tags from a target (Idea/Signal). Meant to be invoked from integration events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.RemoveTags.#ctor(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Remove tags from a target (Idea/Signal). Meant to be invoked from integration events.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Commands.RemoveTagsHandler
member.summary: Handles the removal of specified tags from a target entity.
Removes the specified tags from the target, resolving or creating tag records as needed.
member.param: The command containing the target, actor, and labels to remove.
Resolves or creates tags by label within a locality.
The repository for taggable target aggregates.
The unit of work for persisting changes.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Queries.GetTags
member.summary: Query to retrieve global tags, optionally limited in count.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Queries.GetTags.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Query to retrieve global tags, optionally limited in count.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Queries.GetTagsHandler
member.summary: Handles retrieval of popular tags.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Queries.GetTagsHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Queries.GetTags,Marten.IQuerySession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the most frequently used tags.
member.param: The query containing the limit.
The read-only query session for accessing the read model.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An array of representing the popular tags.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TaggableTargetView
member.summary: Represents a view of a taggable target and its associated tags.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TaggableTargetView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the entity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TaggableTargetView.TargetType
member.summary: Gets or sets the target type for the operation.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TaggableTargetView.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets the tags associated with the item, allowing for categorization and filtering.

member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the object was last accessed.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TagUsageView.UsageCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of times the tag has been used in this locality context.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Services.ITagResolver
member.summary: Resolves existing tags by label or creates new ones.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Services.ITagResolver.ResolveOrCreate(System.String[],BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves existing tags or creates new tags for the specified labels.
member.param: The labels to resolve or create.
The participant initiating the operation.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An array of values for the resolved or created tags.

member.summary: Resolves existing tags by label or creates new ones.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.Services.TagResolver.#ctor(Marten.IQuerySession,BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.ITagRepository,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IUnitOfWork)
member.summary: Resolves existing tags by label or creates new ones.

member.summary: Resolves existing tags or creates new tags for the specified labels.
member.param: The labels to resolve or create.
The participant initiating the operation.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An array of values for the resolved or created tags.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TaggableTargetCreated
member.summary: Represents an event that occurs when a taggable target is created.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with the taggable target.
The version number of the taggable target at the time of creation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TaggableTargetCreated.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Represents an event that occurs when a taggable target is created.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with the taggable target.
The version number of the taggable target at the time of creation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned
member.summary: Represents a domain event that records the assignment of one or more tags to an aggregate entity.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate to which the tags are assigned.
The version of the aggregate at the time the tags were assigned.
An array containing the identifiers of the tags that have been assigned to the aggregate.
The identifier of the participant who performed the tag assignment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Represents a domain event that records the assignment of one or more tags to an aggregate entity.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate to which the tags are assigned.
The version of the aggregate at the time the tags were assigned.
An array containing the identifiers of the tags that have been assigned to the aggregate.
The identifier of the participant who performed the tag assignment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned.TagIds
member.summary: An array containing the identifiers of the tags that have been assigned to the aggregate.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned.AddedByParticipantId
member.summary: The identifier of the participant who performed the tag assignment.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved
member.summary: Represents an event that records the removal of one or more tags from a specific aggregate.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate from which the tags were removed.
The version of the aggregate at the time the tags were removed.
An array containing the identifiers of the tags that have been removed.
The identifier of the participant who performed the tag removal.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Represents an event that records the removal of one or more tags from a specific aggregate.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate from which the tags were removed.
The version of the aggregate at the time the tags were removed.
An array containing the identifiers of the tags that have been removed.
The identifier of the participant who performed the tag removal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved.TagIds
member.summary: An array containing the identifiers of the tags that have been removed.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved.AddedByParticipantId
member.summary: The identifier of the participant who performed the tag removal.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.ITaggableTargetRepository
member.summary: Defines a repository for managing entities, providing methods for retrieving, adding, updating, and deleting taggable targets associated with a specific .

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTarget
member.summary: Represents a session for managing tags associated with a specific target reference.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTarget.#ctor(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified target reference.
member.param: The target reference associated with this tagging session.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTarget.AssignTags(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagId[],BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId)
member.summary: Assigns the specified tags to the participant for tracking and auditing purposes.
member.param: An array of tag identifiers to assign to the participant. Each element must be a valid, non-null tag identifier.
The identifier of the participant performing the tag assignment. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTarget.RemoveTags(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagId[],BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId)
member.summary: Removes the specified tags from the participant.
member.param: An array of tag identifiers to remove from the participant. Each element must correspond to a tag currently associated with the participant. Cannot be null or empty.
The identifier of the participant performing the removal. Used for auditing purposes. Cannot be null.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId
member.summary: Unique identifier for a .

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId.EntityId
member.summary: Gets the original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) by stripping the stream prefix. This is the ID that consuming bounded contexts use to locate their entity.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TaggableTargetId.ForEntity(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a for the given source entity ID, applying the stream prefix.
member.param: The source entity's own ID (e.g. idea-abc123).
member.returns: A new with stream key tagtarget-{entityId}.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TargetType
member.summary: Represents the type of target in a system, categorized by its purpose or nature.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TargetType.Signal
member.summary: The target is a signal.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.TargetType.Idea
member.summary: The target is an idea.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated
member.summary: Represents an event that occurs when a new tag is created.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with the tag.
The version of the event, used for concurrency control.
The preferred human-readable label for the tag.
The preferred slug for the tag, typically used in URLs or identifiers.
The unique identifier of the user who created the tag.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents an event that occurs when a new tag is created.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with the tag.
The version of the event, used for concurrency control.
The preferred human-readable label for the tag.
The preferred slug for the tag, typically used in URLs or identifiers.
The unique identifier of the user who created the tag.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated.PreferredLabel
member.summary: The preferred human-readable label for the tag.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated.PreferredSlug
member.summary: The preferred slug for the tag, typically used in URLs or identifiers.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated.CreatedById
member.summary: The unique identifier of the user who created the tag.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagDeprecated
member.summary: Represents a deprecated tag event within the domain, including details about the reason and the user who performed the action.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with this event.
The version of the event, used for concurrency control or event ordering.
The reason provided for deprecating the tag.
The identifier of the user who performed the deprecation action.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagDeprecated.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a deprecated tag event within the domain, including details about the reason and the user who performed the action.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with this event.
The version of the event, used for concurrency control or event ordering.
The reason provided for deprecating the tag.
The identifier of the user who performed the deprecation action.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagDeprecated.Reason
member.summary: The reason provided for deprecating the tag.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagDeprecated.PerformedById
member.summary: The identifier of the user who performed the deprecation action.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagsMerged
member.summary: Represents a domain event indicating that tags have been merged.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with this event.
The version of the aggregate at the time this event occurred.
The identifier of the tag that remains after the merge.
A read-only list of alias slugs that were carried over to the target tag.
The identifier of the user who performed the tag merge operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagsMerged.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Represents a domain event indicating that tags have been merged.
member.param: The unique identifier of the aggregate associated with this event.
The version of the aggregate at the time this event occurred.
The identifier of the tag that remains after the merge.
A read-only list of alias slugs that were carried over to the target tag.
The identifier of the user who performed the tag merge operation.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagsMerged.TargetTagId
member.summary: The identifier of the tag that remains after the merge.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagsMerged.CarryOverAliasSlugs
member.summary: A read-only list of alias slugs that were carried over to the target tag.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagsMerged.PerformedById
member.summary: The identifier of the user who performed the tag merge operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.ITagRepository
member.summary: Defines a repository for managing entities, providing methods for data access and manipulation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag
member.summary: Represents a globally-scoped tag entity with a preferred label, aliases, and lifecycle metadata.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.#ctor(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagId,System.String,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified identifier and preferred label.
member.param: The unique identifier for the tag.
The preferred label for the tag. This value is used to generate a slug.
The identifier of the user who created the tag.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.PreferredLabel
member.summary: Gets the preferred label or display text associated with this instance.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.Aliases
member.summary: Gets the collection of aliases associated with the current entity. Stored as slugs.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.IsDeprecated
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current tag is deprecated.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.MergedInto
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the tag into which this tag has been merged, if applicable.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.Create(System.String,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the class with the specified preferred label.
member.param: The preferred label for the tag. This value must not be null or empty.
The identifier of the user who is creating the tag.
member.returns: A new instance initialized with the specified label.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.Deprecate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Marks the current tag as deprecated with the specified reason.
member.param: The reason for deprecating the tag. This value cannot be null or empty.
The identifier of the user who is deprecating the tag.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag.MergeInto(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagId,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId)
member.summary: Merges the current tag into the specified target tag, optionally carrying over selected aliases.
member.param: The target into which the current tag will be merged.
A collection of aliases to carry over to the target tag.
The identifier of the user who is performing the merge operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagId
member.summary: Unique identifier for a .

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagSlugifier
member.summary: Provides consistent slug normalization for tags across the domain.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagSlugifier.Slugify(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the specified string to a URL-friendly slug by trimming whitespace and converting all characters to lowercase.
member.param: The input string to be converted. Cannot be .
member.returns: A slugified version of the input string, with leading and trailing whitespace removed and all characters in lowercase.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.TaggingAssemblyReference
member.summary: Marker surface for MediatR assembly registration for Tagging.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.TaggingAssemblyReference.Assembly
member.summary: Gets the assembly that contains the type.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.TaggingServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Dependency injection configuration for the Tagging bounded context.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.TaggingServiceCollectionExtensions.AddTagging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds Tagging services to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection to add services to.
The configuration instance.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.EventHandlers.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationHandler
member.summary: Wolverine message handler for . Creates a taggable target for the idea entity and assigns its initial tags atomically.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.EventHandlers.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent,Wolverine.IMessageBus)
member.summary: Handles the processing of an by creating the taggable target and assigning its initial tags in a single operation.
member.param: The integration event containing details about the authored idea, including its ID, author, tags, and society context.
The message bus used for communication within the system.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.EventHandlers.SignalCapturedHandler
member.summary: Wolverine message handler for . Creates a taggable target for the signal entity and assigns its initial tags atomically.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.EventHandlers.SignalCapturedHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent,Wolverine.IMessageBus)
member.summary: Handles the processing of a signal captured integration event by creating the taggable target and assigning its initial tags in a single operation.
member.param: The integration event containing the signal details, including the target, originator, tags, and timestamp.
The message bus used to invoke the create command.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation of handling the event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventHandlers.TagsAssignedHandler
member.summary: Message handler for TagsAssigned domain events that publishes the corresponding integration event. This handler receives domain events from Marten's async daemon and publishes them via Wolverine's message bus.
Initializes a new instance of the TagsAssignedHandler.
member.param: The mapper for converting domain events to integration events.
The logger instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventHandlers.TagsAssignedHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned,Wolverine.IMessageBus)
member.summary: Handles the TagsAssigned domain event by mapping and publishing the integration event.
member.param: The domain event to handle.
The message bus for publishing the integration event.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventHandlers.TagsRemovedHandler
member.summary: Message handler for TagsRemoved domain events that publishes the corresponding integration event. This handler receives domain events from Marten's async daemon and publishes them via Wolverine's message bus.
Initializes a new instance of the TagsRemovedHandler.
member.param: The mapper for converting domain events to integration events.
The logger instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventHandlers.TagsRemovedHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved,Wolverine.IMessageBus)
member.summary: Handles the TagsRemoved domain event by mapping and publishing the integration event.
member.param: The domain event to handle.
The message bus for publishing the integration event.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventMappers.TagsAssignedIntegrationEventMapper
member.summary: Provides functionality to map a TagsAssigned domain event to one or more integration events for external systems.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventMappers.TagsAssignedIntegrationEventMapper.Map(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned)
member.summary: Maps an AmendmentProposed domain event to an AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.
member.param: The domain event to map.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventMappers.TagsRemovedIntegrationEventMapper
member.summary: Provides functionality to map a TagsRemoved domain event to its corresponding integration event for use in distributed systems or external communication.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.IntegrationEventMappers.TagsRemovedIntegrationEventMapper.Map(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved)
member.summary: Maps an AmendmentProposed domain event to an AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.
member.param: The domain event to map.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Persistence.TaggableTargetRepository
member.summary: Provides a repository for managing entities, enabling data access and persistence operations within the context of a Marten document store.
Provides a repository for managing entities, enabling data access and persistence operations within the context of a Marten document store.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Persistence.TaggingMartenConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for Marten projections in the Tagging bounded context.

member.summary: Configures Marten for the Tagging bounded context.
member.param: The Marten store options to configure.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Persistence.TagRepository
member.summary: Provides a repository for managing entities, including database interactions and transactional messaging support.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Persistence.TagRepository.#ctor(Marten.IDocumentSession,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository{BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Tag,BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.TagId}})
member.summary: Provides a repository for managing entities, including database interactions and transactional messaging support.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TaggableTargetProjection
member.summary: Represents a projection that provides a view of a taggable target's properties.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TaggableTargetProjection.Create(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TaggableTargetCreated)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the TaggableTargetView class using the specified event data.
member.param: The event data containing the aggregate identifier and locality identifier used to initialize the TaggableTargetView.
member.returns: A new TaggableTargetView instance initialized with values from the provided event data.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TaggableTargetProjection.Apply(BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TaggableTargetView,BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsAssigned)
member.summary: Applies the specified tags to the target view by updating its tag collection with the provided tag identifiers.
member.param: The target view whose tag collection will be updated. Cannot be null.
An event containing the tag identifiers to assign to the target view. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TaggableTargetProjection.Apply(BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TaggableTargetView,BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.TaggableTargets.Events.TagsRemoved)
member.summary: Removes the specified tag identifiers from the collection of tags associated with the provided view.
member.param: The target view whose tags will be updated. This parameter must not be null.
An event containing the identifiers of the tags to remove from the view's tag collection. This parameter must not be null.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TagUsageProjection
member.summary: Provides a projection for aggregating and representing tag usage data across multiple streams in a specified view format.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TagUsageProjection.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TagUsageProjection class, configuring identity mappings for tag-related events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TagUsageProjection.Create(BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the TagUsageView class using the data from a TagCreated event.
member.param: The TagCreated event containing the information used to initialize the TagUsageView instance. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A TagUsageView instance populated with values from the specified TagCreated event. The instance will have its usage count set to zero and its first and last used timestamps set to their default values.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Infrastructure.Projections.TagUsageProjection.Apply(BindingChaos.Tagging.Application.ReadModels.TagUsageView,BindingChaos.Tagging.Domain.Tags.Events.TagCreated)
member.summary: Applies the specified tag creation event to the provided tag usage view, updating its properties to reflect the new tag information.
member.param: The tag usage view instance to be updated with the tag creation details.
The tag creation event containing the preferred slug to apply to the tag usage view.
member.returns: The updated tag usage view instance with properties set according to the tag creation event.
